title: Nerolac Select is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nerolac Select is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Nerolac Select are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nerolac Select:
Nerolac Select is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nerolac Select!
